name: style

metadata.response:
Item Details:

## style
**Type:** registry:style
**Dependencies:** class-variance-authority, lucide-react, radix-ui
**Dev Dependencies:** tw-animate-css, shadcn

visual_summary: The Style component is used to display a visual representation of a style. It is commonly used when a developer wants to showcase a specific typography, color palette, or layout. You can use it to demonstrate different design options during the development or design phase.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: style
Description: The Style component is used to display a visual representation of a style. It is commonly used when a developer wants to showcase a specific typography, color palette, or layout. You can use it to demonstrate different design options during the development or design phase.
Style: e.g. material, bootstrap, custom
Interactions: 
Tags: style, preview, design

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
